# Vendored dependency

This directory is a vendored copy of [cc-status-buttons](https://github.com/noam-bash/cc-status-buttons), pinned at commit `474e6c1`.

Claude Code plugins are installed by git-clone with no `npm install` step, so the library is vendored here rather than declared as an npm dependency. To update, re-copy `src/` and `adapters/` from the upstream repo and bump the commit hash above.

Do not edit these files in place — change them upstream and re-vendor.
